banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock filer: a married Roman Catholic software engineer filing jointly with a spouse of the same religion and same home address, using a domestic German bank account for any refund, for tax year 2025 via Mein ELSTER. No income-replacement benefits received, no tax-advisor involvement, and no supplementary statements needed. All names, numbers, and amounts are fabricated test data, not a real taxpayer's information.

safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (de/finanzamt/income-tax-return-elster). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to the Bundeszentralamt für Steuern, any Finanzamt, or any government system. A human (the taxpayer) must review every value below against their actual Mein ELSTER pre-filled screens — VaSt auto-fills most figures from employers, banks, pension providers, health insurers, and other third parties, so the real return may differ from this fabricated scenario — confirm each figure, and explicitly authorize submission through the taxpayer's own Mein ELSTER account (or a registered tax advisor / Lohnsteuerhilfeverein) before this return is filed. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
